title: Önder ÇEREZCİ, MD
content:
Önder ÇEREZCİ, MD

Assoc. Prof.

FHS / Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation

onder.cerezci

uskudar.edu.tr

Higher Education Council Formatted CV

Rate Us

Short CV

He graduated from Ankara University Faculty of Medicine in 1989. He received Physical Therapy and Rehabilitation Specialist in 1995. Between 1995 and 1996, he was involved in the rehabilitation of Traumatic Brain Injured Patients at The Institute of Research and Rehabilitation Baylor College of Medicine.
